title: Bootstrapping
description: Founders use personal savings or business revenue to build the startup without external investors.

title: Friends and Family Funding
description: Initial funding raised from trusted friends and family members to validate the business idea.

title: Angel Investors
description: High-net-worth individuals who invest in early-stage startups in exchange for equity.

title: Venture Capital
description: Professional investment firms that fund high-growth startups with scalable business models.

title: Startup India Seed Fund
description: Government-backed financial assistance for proof of concept, prototype development and commercialization.

title: SIDBI Support
description: Financial assistance, loans and startup-focused schemes provided by SIDBI.

title: Crowdfunding
description: Raising capital from a large number of people through online crowdfunding platforms.

title: Business Loans
description: Loans from banks or financial institutions to support startup operations and growth.

title: Incubator Funding
description: Funding, mentorship and workspace support provided through startup incubators.

title: Accelerator Programs
description: Programs offering mentorship, networking and seed investment in exchange for equity.
